#+JETPACS_APP: parser-parity
#+TITLE: Parser parity
#+JETPACS_ICON: rule
#+JETPACS_ORDER: 7
#+JETPACS_APP_FORMAT: 2
#+TODO: TODO NEXT | DONE
#+TAGS: work home

* Table
:PROPERTIES:
:ICON: table_chart
:ORDER: 10
:KIND: table
:COLTYPES: text number date checkbox enum(A,B)
:COLUMNS: Text | Number | Date | Done | Choice
:END:

| Text | Number | Date       | Done | Choice |
|------+--------+------------+------+--------|
| row  |      1 | 2026-07-12 | [ ]  | A      |

* Checklist
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: checklist
:END:

- [ ] One

* Records
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: records
:SCHEMA: %item(Title) %todo(Status) %deadline %scheduled %priority %tags %effort %category
:COLTYPES: text enum(TODO,NEXT,DONE) date date enum(A,B,C) text text text
:FILTER: (todo "TODO")
:ACTIONS: todo(DONE) schedule deadline tags(work,home) priority(A) refile(* Archive) archive(subtree)
:END:

* Notes
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: notes
:SOURCE: vault/
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Title)
:COLTYPES: text
:END:

* Board
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: board
:SOURCE: records.org
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Title) %TODO(Status)
:COLTYPES: text enum(TODO,NEXT,DONE)
:GROUP_BY: TODO
:END:

* Calendar
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: calendar
:SOURCE: records.org
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Title) %DEADLINE(Date)
:COLTYPES: text date
:DATE_FIELD: DEADLINE
:END:

* Gallery
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: gallery
:SOURCE: records.org
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Title) %Photo(Image)
:COLTYPES: text text
:IMAGE_FIELD: Photo
:END:
